label: 3D 截面 Loft
description: 将多个 3D 截面环 loft 成 mesh 实体。各截面点数必须一致。何时用：截面位姿在 3D 空间任意摆放的渐变体（扭转/弯曲过渡、船体/管道接头），比 g_loft 的平面截面更自由。
description-en: Loft multiple 3D section rings into a mesh solid. Each section must have the same point count. Use when: a tapered body whose sections sit at arbitrary 3D poses (twisting/bending transitions, hulls, duct joints) — freer than g_loft's planar sections.

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 上游 Geometry（3D 截面直接由 sections 给出，不引用其它 shape）
inputs.description-en: Upstream Geometry; sections are given inline via `sections` and reference no other shape.

inputs.name: sections
inputs.label: 3D 截面
inputs.description: 数组或用 | 分隔的截面；每个截面为 [x1,y1,z1,...]，各截面点数必须一致
inputs.description-en: Array or |-delimited sections; each is [x1,y1,z1,...] and all sections must share the same point count.

inputs.name: cap
inputs.label: 封端
inputs.description: true = 首尾截面封口成实体
inputs.description-en: true = cap the first/last sections into a solid.

inputs.name: closed
inputs.label: 首尾截面闭合
inputs.description: true = 首尾截面相接成环
inputs.description-en: true = connect the first and last sections into a loop.

inputs.name: id
inputs.label: id
inputs.description: 本结果的自定义 id；空 = 自动 sloft{n}

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 追加放样实体后的 Geometry
outputs.description-en: Geometry after appending the lofted solid.

outputs.name: id
outputs.label: id
outputs.description: 本行 shape 的 id（供下游引用）；截面非法时为空串
outputs.description-en: Id of the new shape (for downstream refs). Empty string when sections were invalid.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误
outputs.description: 截面数不足/点数不足/各截面点数不一致时的原因；非空表示未追加任何几何，批次仍可能报 ok，务必读取
outputs.description-en: Reason when there are too few sections, too few points, or mismatched point counts. Non-empty means nothing was appended even though the batch may report ok — always read it.
